VAL-DESIGN-003.reason: All 48 inspected elements (buttons, cards/containers, inputs, badges/tags, images, accordions) have borderRadius: 0px. A full-page scan of every DOM element ('*') found zero elements with non-zero border-radius. Visual screenshots confirm sharp rectangular corners on all UI components including primary/secondary buttons, input fields, card containers, carousel slides, and footer newsletter input/button.

VAL-DESIGN-004.reason: All button variants match the design system specification. Primary buttons: black background (rgb(0,0,0)), white text (rgb(255,255,255)), 0px border-radius (square corners), uppercase text-transform, letter-spacing ~0.06em (0.84px at 14px font), sans-serif font (Inter), transition-duration 0.7s with cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1). Secondary buttons: transparent background, black text, 1px solid black border (outlined), same transition spec. Link buttons: transparent background, terracotta color (rgb(198,93,62)), underline decoration, same transition spec. Disabled state reduces opacity to 0.5. All sizes (small, default, large) maintain consistent styling.
